title: COVID-19 loan guarantee schemes repayment data: December 2024
body: "These quarterly transparency data publications provide updates on the cumulative performance of the government’s COVID-19 loan guarantee schemes, including:   the Coronavirus Business Interruption Loan Scheme (CBILS) the Coronavirus Large Business Interruption Loan Scheme (CLBILS) the Bounce Back Loan Scheme (BBLS)   The data in this publication is as of 31 December 2024 unless otherwise stated. It comes from information submitted to the British Business Bank’s scheme portal by accredited scheme lenders. "

taxons.title: Funding and support for businesses during COVID-19
